title: Cranberry Butter Roll Bites
description: A Mexican-inspired twist on a classic breakfast pastry, these sweet and flaky bites are perfect for a morning treat. The cranberry and butter filling adds a tangy and rich flavor.
instructions: Thaw the rolls according to the package instructions.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the cranberries to the melted butter and cook until they start to release their juice.
Roll out each roll into a thin sheet.
Place a spoonful of the cranberry and butter mixture onto one half of the roll.
Fold the other half over the filling and press the edges to seal.
Place the roll bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
